subject: Beauty — a female-presenting trainer-class figure in a red top standing in an urban shopping district, canonical Pokemon Sword and Shield Trainer class
description: A female-presenting figure stands in a relaxed pose in what appears to be an urban shopping or fashion district. She wears a red top and casual pants, and has short hair. Her stance is casual and confident, turned slightly toward the viewer. Behind her, a storefront facade and urban streetscape are visible — buildings with windows and signage rendered in a soft background. The lighting is warm and daytime, consistent with a city shopping area. The illustration is rendered in a clean anime style. The card label 'Beauty' corresponds to the canonical Trainer class of the same name in Pokemon Sword and Shield games.
foreground: female-presenting trainer figure in red top, casual pants
background: urban storefront, buildings, warm daytime light
emotion: confident, relaxed — casual standing pose, slight forward lean
